title: New in Claude Managed Agents: self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels
preview: Starting today, Claude Managed Agents can operate in a sandbox you control and connect to your private Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. Both the sandbox where an agent executes tools and the services it reaches run within the established boundaries of your enterprise, under your security and runtime controls.

blocks.english: Starting today, Claude Managed Agents can operate in a sandbox you control and connect to your private Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. Both the sandbox where an agent executes tools and the services it reaches run within the established boundaries of your enterprise, under your security and runtime controls.
blocks.chinese: 从今天起，Claude 托管代理可以在您控制的沙箱中运行，并连接到您的私有模型上下文协议（MCP）服务器。代理执行工具的沙箱以及它所访问的服务都运行在您企业既有的边界之内，受您的安全和运行时控制。

blocks.english: The sandbox runs on your own infrastructure, or with managed providers like Cloudflare, Daytona, Modal, or Vercel to handle the compute and isolation for you.
blocks.chinese: 沙箱可以运行在您自己的基础设施上，也可以通过 Cloudflare、Daytona、Modal 或 Vercel 等托管服务商来处理计算和隔离需求。

blocks.english: On the Claude Platform, self-hosted sandboxes is available in public beta and MCP tunnels in research preview (request access).
blocks.chinese: 在 Claude 平台上，自托管沙箱已进入公开测试版，MCP 隧道处于研究预览阶段（需申请访问）。

blocks.english: Keep agent execution within your perimeter
blocks.chinese: 将代理执行保持在您的边界之内

blocks.english: With self-hosted sandboxes, you keep sensitive files, packages, and services in your own infrastructure or with a managed sandbox provider. The agent loop that handles orchestration, context management, and error recovery stays on Anthropic's infrastructure, while tool execution moves to your own configured environment.
blocks.chinese: 通过自托管沙箱，您可以将敏感文件、软件包和服务保留在自己的基础设施或托管沙箱提供商中。负责编排、上下文管理和错误恢复的代理循环仍运行在 Anthropic 的基础设施上，而工具执行则转移到您自行配置的环境中。

blocks.english: Inside your perimeter, network policies, audit logging, and security tooling are already in place, and files and repositories don't leave. You also control the compute: resource sizing and the runtime image are set on your side, so agents running compute-heavy work such as long builds or image generation get the CPU, memory, and capacity the task needs.
blocks.chinese: 在您的边界内，网络策略、审计日志和安全工具已就位，文件和代码库不会外泄。您还控制着计算资源：资源配置大小和运行时镜像由您这边设定，因此运行长时间构建或图像生成等计算密集型任务的代理能够获得任务所需的 CPU、内存和容量。

blocks.english: Choose your sandbox client
blocks.chinese: 选择您的沙箱客户端

blocks.english: Bring any sandbox client you want, or start with one of our supported providers:
blocks.chinese: 您可以使用任何沙箱客户端，也可以从我们支持的提供商中选择：

blocks.english: **Cloudflare** runs sandboxes at scale using microVMs and lighter weight isolates. Outbound network requests are in your control with zero-trust secrets injection, customizable proxies to audit, reroute, or modify egress, and the ability to connect to internal services over Cloudflare's network. **Amplitude** is building Design Agent, an internal tool for on-brand production UI and marketing design, on Managed Agents and Cloudflare for tighter observability and control.
blocks.chinese: **Cloudflare** 使用 microVM 和更轻量级的隔离技术大规模运行沙箱。通过零信任密钥注入、可自定义代理以审计、重路由或修改出站流量，以及通过 Cloudflare 网络连接内部服务的能力，您可以控制所有出站网络请求。**Amplitude** 正在托管代理和 Cloudflare 上构建 Design Agent——一个用于品牌一致的生产级 UI 和营销设计的内部工具，以实现更精细的可观测性和控制。

blocks.english: **Daytona** sandboxes are full composable computers, long-running and stateful. The same primitive runs a quick burst or an agent that works for hours. The sandbox stays accessible while a session runs over SSH or an authenticated preview URL, or can be paused and restored with full state preserved. **Clay's** GTM engineering agent, Sculptor, builds, tests, and monitors workflows autonomously on Managed Agents and Daytona.
blocks.chinese: **Daytona** 沙箱是完全可组合的计算机，支持长时间运行且具有状态。同一原语既可以运行快速突发任务，也可以运行持续数小时的代理。在会话运行期间，沙箱可通过 SSH 或经过认证的预览 URL 访问，也可以暂停并恢复，完整保留状态。**Clay** 的 GTM 工程代理 Sculptor 在托管代理和 Daytona 上自主构建、测试和监控工作流。

blocks.english: **Modal** is a cloud platform built for AI workloads, where sandboxes share the same foundation as Modal's functions, storage, and networking primitives, giving you everything you need to build production AI systems. Modal's custom container runtime delivers sub-second startup on any image, scales to hundreds of thousands of concurrent sandboxes, and gives you CPU and GPU resources on demand.
blocks.chinese: **Modal** 是专为 AI 工作负载构建的云平台，沙箱与 Modal 的函数、存储和网络原语共享同一基础，为您提供构建生产级 AI 系统所需的一切。Modal 的自定义容器运行时可在任何镜像上实现亚秒级启动，可扩展至数十万个并发沙箱，并按需提供 CPU 和 GPU 资源。

blocks.english: **Vercel** sandboxes combine VM security, VPC peering, and bring your own cloud with millisecond startup time. Managed Agents handles the model, tools, and session state, while the Vercel Sandbox firewall injects credentials at the network boundary so they never enter the sandbox. **Rogo**, an AI platform for institutional finance, is building an analyst agent on Managed Agents and Vercel Sandbox to handle their proprietary data securely.
blocks.chinese: **Vercel** 沙箱结合了虚拟机安全、VPC 对等连接和自带云功能，启动时间仅为毫秒级。托管代理处理模型、工具和会话状态，而 Vercel 沙箱防火墙在网络边界注入凭据，使凭据永远不会进入沙箱。**Rogo** 是一个面向机构金融的 AI 平台，正在托管代理和 Vercel 沙箱上构建分析师代理，以安全处理其专有数据。

blocks.english: Connect to services within your private network
blocks.chinese: 连接到您私有网络中的服务

blocks.english: With **MCP tunnels**, your agents reach MCP servers inside your private network without exposing them to the public internet. Internal databases, private APIs, knowledge bases, and ticketing systems become tools your agents can call. A lightweight gateway you deploy makes a single outbound connection, no inbound firewall rules, no public endpoints, and traffic encrypted end to end.
blocks.chinese: 通过 **MCP 隧道**，您的代理可以访问私有网络内的 MCP 服务器，而无需将其暴露到公共互联网。内部数据库、私有 API、知识库和工单系统都成为代理可调用的工具。您部署的轻量级网关仅建立单一出站连接——无需入站防火墙规则、无需公网端点，且流量全程加密。

blocks.english: MCP tunnels is supported in Managed Agents and the Messages API. MCP tunnels is managed from workspace settings within the Claude Console by organization admins.
blocks.chinese: MCP 隧道在托管代理和消息 API 中均受支持。MCP 隧道由组织管理员在 Claude 控制台的工作区设置中管理。

blocks.english: "When building Sculptor, Clay's GTM engineering agent for building and testing GTM workflows autonomously, we wanted to give it a more flexible and powerful way to take actions than just tools in a loop. Claude Managed Agents let us replicate the power of a local agent with the reliability, versioning, and background execution of a cloud agent. And running it with our sandboxes, like Daytona, gives us control over the filesystem, so we can mount external file stores and install packages on the fly."  — Ryan Chang, AI Engineering
blocks.chinese: "在构建 Sculptor——Clay 用于自主构建和测试 GTM 工作流的 GTM 工程代理时，我们希望赋予它比单纯的循环工具更灵活、更强大的操作方式。Claude 托管代理让我们能够将本地代理的强大能力与云代理的可靠性、版本控制和后台执行相结合。使用我们自己的沙箱（如 Daytona）运行，使我们能够控制文件系统，从而挂载外部文件存储并动态安装软件包。"

blocks.english: "Claude Managed Agents handles the agent loop, Vercel's sandboxes give us an environment we can configure for our workloads. This gives us the option to leverage best-in-class infrastructure while we focus on what compounds for a financial AI platform: depth and breadth of tools and data, and a product surface built for how investors and bankers actually work."  — Strib Walker, Head of Product
blocks.chinese: "Claude 托管代理处理代理循环，Vercel 的沙箱为我们提供了可针对工作负载配置的环境。这使我们能够利用一流的基础设施，同时专注于对金融 AI 平台而言具有复利效应的方面：工具和数据的深度与广度，以及为投资者和银行家实际工作方式打造的产品界面。"

blocks.english: "Our use cases require secure orchestration of internal tools across a complex product surface. Modal's sandbox gives us the security boundary our enterprise customers need, and combining it with Claude Managed Agents gives us a powerful harness without hand-rolling extra complexity. We had a working version up in under a week, raising reliability for our customers."  — Sai Yandapalli, CTO
blocks.chinese: "我们的用例需要在复杂的产品界面上安全编排内部工具。Modal 的沙箱为我们企业客户提供了所需的安全边界，将其与 Claude 托管代理结合，无需手动构建额外的复杂性即可获得强大的控制能力。我们在不到一周内就让一个可用版本上线，提升了客户可靠性。"

blocks.english: "Claude Managed Agents and Cloudflare let us get the first useful version of our design agent running in two days on infrastructure we already know and trust."  — Will Newton, Design
blocks.chinese: "Claude 托管代理和 Cloudflare 让我们在两天内就在我们熟悉和信赖的基础设施上运行了设计代理的第一个可用版本。"

blocks.english: "As we scale agentic commerce for local businesses, we need a highly efficient path to production with full harness control, scale, and reliability. We're excited to evaluate Claude Managed Agents for this next step, building on our AI infrastructure with Modal!"  — Andy Fang, Co-founder
blocks.chinese: "随着我们为本地商家扩展代理商务，我们需要一条高效的生产路径，具备完整的控制、规模化和可靠性。我们很高兴能在与 Modal 合作的 AI 基础设施上，评估 Claude 托管代理作为下一步的解决方案！"

blocks.english: Getting started
blocks.chinese: 开始使用

blocks.english: Both self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels work within the same core primitives supported by Managed Agents. Self-hosted sandboxes is available in public beta and MCP tunnels in research preview. To get started with MCP tunnels, request access.
blocks.chinese: 自托管沙箱和 MCP 隧道均在托管代理支持的相同核心原语中运行。自托管沙箱已进入公开测试版，MCP 隧道处于研究预览阶段。要开始使用 MCP 隧道，请申请访问权限。

blocks.english: Explore our docs to learn more, follow our cookbooks to set up your sandbox provider, or deploy your first agent in the Claude Console.
blocks.chinese: 查阅我们的文档了解更多信息，按照我们的教程设置沙箱提供商，或在 Claude 控制台中部署您的第一个代理。
